originalTitle: Alphabet asks shareholders to foot an $80 billion bill for AI expansion
summary: Berkshire Hathaway is buying Alphabet’s stock at a discount as part of a newly announced equity offering.
content: Berkshire Hathaway is buying Alphabet’s stock at a discount as part of a newly announced equity offering.
chineseTitle: Alphabet 要求股东为 AI 扩张支付 800 亿美元
chineseSummary: 作为新宣布的股票发行的一部分，伯克希尔·哈撒韦公司正在以折扣价购买 Alphabet 的股票。
chineseContent: 作为新宣布的股票发行的一部分，伯克希尔·哈撒韦公司正在以折扣价购买 Alphabet 的股票。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
